items.markdown:
South Africa’s top accounting software options range from robust global platforms to localized tools tailored for micro-businesses and VAT compliance . Key solutions include **Sage**, **Xero**, **Zoho Books** , and **QuickBooks**.[](https://quickbooks.intuit.com/za/accounting-software/) [[1]](https://quickbooks.intuit.com/za/accounting-software/)[[2]](https://www.fundinghub.co.za/guide/the-best-small-business-accounting-software-for-south-african-smes)[[3]](https://www.sage.com/en-za/accounting-software/)[[4]](https://www.xero.com/za/)[[5]](https://www.softwaresuggest.com/accounting-software/south-africa)

Premier Accounting Platforms

- **Xero:** Highly popular in South Africa, it offers direct bank feeds with major banks, seamless VAT processing, and integrates with AI tools like JAX.[](https://www.xero.com/za/) [[1]](https://www.xero.com/za/)[[2]](https://www.zoho.com/za/books/)[[3]](https://www.evergreen-accounting.co.za/best-accounting-software-south-africa-2025/)[[4]](https://www.capterra.co.za/directory/1/accounting/software)[[5]](https://creations.africa/)
- **Sage Accounting (formerly Sage One):** A dominant local favorite that is fully SARS-compliant and great for managing payroll and scalable business growth.[](https://www.sage.com/en-za/accounting-software/) [[1]](https://www.sage.com/en-za/accounting-software/)[[2]](https://www.sage.com/en-za/size/small-business/)[[3]](https://www.sage.com/en-za/sage-business-cloud/accounting/features/tax/)[[4]](https://alphalogix.co.uk/accounts-software/sage-accounting/)
- **Zoho Books:** Provides a highly cost-effective, VAT-compliant solution with strong inventory integrations for growing businesses.[](https://www.zoho.com/za/books/) [[1]](https://www.zoho.com/za/books/)[[2]](https://www.softwaresuggest.com/accounting-software/south-africa)
- **QuickBooks:** Well-known for small to medium businesses, offering mobile tracking, invoicing, and accountant collaboration tools.[](https://quickbooks.intuit.com/za/accounting-software/) [[1]](https://quickbooks.intuit.com/za/accounting-software/)[[2]](https://quickbooks.intuit.com/za/accounting-software/offer-tcs/)[[3]](https://www.boldbi.com/blog/top-five-accounting-software-solutions-for-smbs/)[[4]](https://www.oneupnetworks.com/post/quickbooks-vs-sap-vs-xero-accounting-software-comparison/)[[5]](https://www.vintti.com/blog/reviewing-the-best-accounting-apps-for-mobile)

Micro-Business & Localized Tools

- **Stub:** A locally built startup tailored for small, informal, and micro-businesses. It integrates directly with Capitec to automate banking feeds and reconciliation, making it a highly accessible option for entrepreneurs without a finance background.[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eEQ_OyjJsRA&t=6) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eEQ_OyjJsRA&t=6)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JTGFOrgmsFw&t=1)

For tips on how to pick the ideal accounting software for your specific business size and needs:![Related video thumbnail](https://encrypted-tbn1.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcQfWtpwR9ui3qxqgUsmmXYt2UEYzGSWZArJjtFxT3qADzdViiof)
